truthAudit.Summary: Audit of Run 1 against true vulnerabilities SC-V3-001 through SC-V3-020. Run 1 correctly identified 4 vulnerabilities (SC-V3-004, SC-V3-005, SC-V3-009, SC-V3-013) but misclassified their CWE identifiers and titles. It also contains 1 false positive (AdminConsole::execute_admin_command). The remaining 15 vulnerabilities were missed.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote:
std::string command = validator_cmd + " " + config_file;
int result = system(command.c_str());
Items.Notes: Run 1 identifies command injection in config validation, though mislabels CWE as 933 instead of 78.
Run 1 identifies stack buffer overflow in input processing, though mislabels CWE as 116 instead of 120/121.
Run 1 identifies heap overflow in expression parser, though mislabels CWE as 116 instead of 122.
Run 1 identifies command injection/insecure file handling in append_override_audit_event, though mislabels CWE as 933 instead of 377.
